sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39230" key="e)pidiata/ssomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδια-τάσσομαι</orth>, <sense id="n39230.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make additions to a will,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Gal.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
